observations.summary: Dan's mother, Zuna, was a dreamwalker who taught Dan to enter and move within another person's sleep with deliberate intention.

evidence.quote: His mother, Zuna, had been a dreamwalker—rarer than it sounds and considerably more dangerous than it looks. She had taught Dan the same capacity before she went, which is to say: she had taught him to enter another person's sleep and move within it with deliberate intention.

observations.notes: This establishes a rare and significant ability inherited from his mother, foundational to Dan's character.

observations.summary: The dreamwalking ability is said to belong to those who consort with certain patient, curious watchers of the world—creatures of thread and careful observation with long tales.

evidence.quote: Some say such an ability belongs to those who consort with certain patient, curious watchers of the world—creatures of thread and careful observation whose tales are considerably longer than a ball of yarn.

observations.notes: This hints at a mystical or mythic origin of the dreamwalking power, linking it to enigmatic entities.
